spec_match.rationale: Queries the live navigator.gpu and requestAdapter(), extracts details from the new adapter.info (including adapterType and isFallbackAdapter), and requests a real GPUDevice to compare live limits against spec defaults.

interactive.rationale: Loads your system's real GPU characteristics dynamically, showing a beautiful live vs spec limits table comparing 19 separate properties.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Matches the blurb perfectly, highlighting the comparison of deprecated and new APIs with a live readout.

edge_cases.rationale: Correctly handles browser permissions, missing WebGPU adapters, handles device request failures, and destroys the requested GPUDevice to prevent resource leaks.

references.rationale: The concept page now includes the required https://chromestatus.com/feature/4870179714236416 self-heal reference link.

design_system.rationale: Conforms perfectly with the design system rules, responsive table styling, and correct contrast.

summary: The previous reference-only critique has been resolved: the concept page now carries the canonical ChromeStatus self-heal link required by the repository rules.
